findings.issue: Error states use red (#FF3B30) instead of purple (#800080) as per Law 1
findings.recommended_fix: Update error color codes to match Foundation Law specifications

findings.issue: Energy adaptation modes (Full/Mid/Low) not implemented across all UI components
findings.recommended_fix: Implement energy mode toggle and conditional styling in all UI elements

findings.issue: Contains phrases like 'You failed' which violate Shame-Free Language (Law 3)
findings.recommended_fix: Replace guilt-inducing language with neutral feedback phrasing
